creator: michael.scheidell@secnap.com
text:
If there is no real reason to do this, then don't

if you MUST do this, then you also need to bump PORTEPOC  to indicate a 
radical change.

and/or, just leave it as 106_1 and let users check freebsd-core.

if you do this, than anything that depends on freeswitch (pizza? others? 
new port of freebpx/bluebox?) will break.

Question you should answer: is this REALLY necessary.

-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
